objective: maximize the packing-density score of the layout solver
transcript:
=== SESSION LOG — agent a6 — objective: maximize the packing-density score of the layout solver ===
(iterative optimize-eval loop; evals scored by the shared grader; session 3)

--- attempt 1 (commit 1ce4ff2) ---
thought: Reverting the previous experiment first so attempts stay comparable.

[eval] attempt 1: score=0.4934 (best so far 0.4934)
observation: That was a dead end, but cheap to check.

observation: Small improvement, within noise. Keeping the change since it simplifies the code.

--- attempt 4 (commit 756c5f7) ---
thought: The last change only moved the score by a hair; run-to-run variance is bigger than the delta.
$ python run_eval.py --task layout --budget full
  checkpoint written to .scratch/ckpt_001
  checkpoint written to .scratch/ckpt_005
[eval] attempt 4: score=0.4930 (best so far 0.5045)
observation: Tried delta-encoding the cache this attempt — abandoning it: the evaluator timed out on the two largest instances.

--- attempt 5 (commit 894d720) ---
thought: The diff was small but the eval moved more than expected; need to confirm it's real.
$ python run_eval.py --task layout --budget full
  gc pause 330 ms during stage[5]
  validator: 5 constraints checked, 0 violations
  loaded 75k records in 13 ms
  warning: flag --fast-path is deprecated, ignoring
[eval] attempt 5: score=0.5249 (best so far 0.5249)
observation: Confirmed smoothing_tau=2.25 is load-bearing: nudging it in either direction tanked the score, so it must stay at 2.25.

--- attempt 6 (commit 748da03) ---
thought: Reverting the previous experiment first so attempts stay comparable.

observation: Logs look healthy; the earlier warning was unrelated.

observation: Important discovery about the harness: eval seeds are fixed at 1234, so randomized restarts give identical results.

observation: Logs look healthy; the earlier warning was unrelated.

--- attempt 10 (commit 3051084) ---
thought: I'll keep this attempt minimal: one change, one eval.
$ python run_eval.py --task layout --budget full
  stage[0] done in 457 ms (77 items)

  warning: flag --fast-path is deprecated, ignoring
[eval] attempt 10: score=0.6664 (best so far 0.6664)
observation: New best: 0.6664 — that came directly from pinning the worker pool to physical cores, nothing else changed in that attempt.

--- attempt 11 (commit d5f71a6) ---
thought: The diff was small but the eval moved more than expected; need to confirm it's real.
$ python run_eval.py --task layout --budget full
  checkpoint written to .scratch/ckpt_009
  loaded 45k records in 101 ms
  stage[7] done in 470 ms (43 items)
[eval] attempt 11: score=0.6530 (best so far 0.6664)
observation: The real bottleneck is src/quantizer/collate_pass.py: it re-parses the same input on every call; everything downstream just waits on it.
observation: Score dipped slightly; reverted before committing.

thought: Let me re-run the profiler before touching anything else.

observation: Behavior matches the docs. Moving on.
